Classes/MIDITimeTableMeasureView.html.abstract: Draws time table measures in its frame. Use tintColor property to change text and bar colors.

Classes/MIDITimeTablePlayheadView.html.name: MIDITimeTablePlayheadView
Classes/MIDITimeTablePlayheadView.html.abstract: Draws a triangle, movable playhead that customisable with a custom shape layer or an image.

Classes/MIDITimeTableView.html.name: MIDITimeTableView
Classes/MIDITimeTableView.html.abstract: Draws time table with multiple rows and editable cells. Heavily customisable.

Typealiases.html.name: Type Aliases
Typealiases.html.abstract: The following type aliases are available globally.
